title: Japan Company Data Enrichment (Official Registry)
description: Enrich Japanese companies from the official gBizINFO registry: firmographics, subsidies, procurement and patent counts. Give 13-digit corporate numbers or company names. The first 20 companies of every run are free.

corporate_numbers.title: Corporate numbers
corporate_numbers.description: 13-digit Japanese corporate numbers (法人番号), e.g. 7010001008844 for Hitachi, Ltd. Up to 1,000 companies per run.

company_names.title: Company names (optional)
company_names.description: Japanese company names, resolved to corporate numbers via the official National Tax Agency registry. Unambiguous matches only — ambiguous names are reported, not guessed.

fields.title: Activity blocks
fields.description: Which government-activity blocks to fetch per company: subsidies, procurement, patents. Default: all three. Patent responses can be tens of MB for large corporations — drop "patents" for faster runs.

enrich.title: LLM enrichment (English one-liner + name transliteration)
enrich.description: Add an English one-sentence business summary and a romanized company name (only when no official English name is registered). Uses an LLM; billed per enriched company.
